requirement_topic.en: Structural Stability and Durability — BS EN 12520 / BS EN 12521
requirement_topic.zh: 结构稳定性与耐久性——BS EN 12520 / BS EN 12521
requirement_topic.zht: 結構穩定性與耐久性——BS EN 12520 / BS EN 12521

summary.en: The mandatory legal obligation is the UK General Product Safety Regulations 2005: furniture placed on the GB market must be safe. BS EN 12520:2015 (domestic seating) and BS EN 12521:2015 (domestic tables) are voluntary UK/European standards commonly used to evidence structural safety and support a presumption that the product meets recognised safety expectations; other technically equivalent evidence may be used. For trade buyers (B2B), many UK retailers ask for BS EN 12520/12521 test reports as a procurement condition, but that is a contractual route rather than a statutory requirement. BS EN 1335 covers office seating. BS EN 747 covers children's bunk beds, while any legal duties for children's products come from the applicable UK product-safety legislation, not from the standard itself.
summary.zh: 强制性法律义务来自英国《2005年一般产品安全条例》：投放大不列颠市场的家具必须安全。BS EN 12520:2015（家用座椅）和BS EN 12521:2015（家用桌子）是自愿性英国/欧洲标准，通常用于证明结构安全并支持产品符合公认安全预期的推定；也可使用其他技术上等效的证据。对于贸易买家（B2B），许多英国零售商会将BS EN 12520/12521检测报告作为采购条件，但这是合同路径而非法定要求。BS EN 1335适用于办公座椅。BS EN 747适用于儿童双层床；儿童产品的任何法律义务来自适用的英国产品安全立法，而非标准本身。
summary.zht: 強制性法律義務來自英國《2005年一般產品安全條例》：投放大不列顛市場的家具必須安全。BS EN 12520:2015（家用座椅）和BS EN 12521:2015（家用桌子）是自願性英國/歐洲標準，通常用於證明結構安全並支持產品符合公認安全預期的推定；也可使用其他技術上等效的證據。對於貿易買家（B2B），許多英國零售商會將BS EN 12520/12521檢測報告作為採購條件，但這是合同路徑而非法定要求。BS EN 1335適用於辦公座椅。BS EN 747適用於兒童雙層床；兒童產品的任何法律義務來自適用的英國產品安全立法，而非標準本身。

standards_or_laws: BS EN 12520:2015 — Furniture — Strength, durability and safety — Requirements for domestic seating
BS EN 12521:2015 — Furniture — Strength, durability and safety — Requirements for domestic tables
BS EN 1335-1:2020 — Office furniture — Office work chair
BS EN 747-1:2012+A1:2015 — Furniture — Bunk beds and high beds — Safety, strength and durability requirements

summary.en: China's structural requirements for wooden furniture are in GB/T 3324-2017 (General technical requirements for wooden furniture) — a voluntary standard covering dimensions, materials, workmanship and stability. Specific strength tests are in QB/T 1952.1-2012 (Upholstered furniture — Technical requirements for sofas) and QB/T 2603-2003 (Furniture — Strength tests). These QB/T standards are industry standards issued by MIIT. Chinese manufacturers exporting to the UK commonly hold QB/T test reports. However, QB/T test parameters, load levels and fatigue cycles do not match BS EN 12520/12521 test protocols and are NOT accepted by UK retailers as equivalent.
summary.zh: 中国木家具结构要求见于GB/T 3324-2017（木家具通用技术条件）——一项涵盖尺寸、材料、工艺和稳定性的自愿性标准。具体强度测试见于QB/T 1952.1-2012（软体家具——沙发技术要求）和QB/T 2603-2003（家具——强度测试）。这些QB/T标准为工业和信息化部（MIIT）发布的行业标准。出口英国的中国制造商通常持有QB/T检测报告。但QB/T测试参数、载荷等级和疲劳循环次数与BS EN 12520/12521测试规程不符，英国零售商不接受其作为等效依据。
summary.zht: 中國木家具結構要求見於GB/T 3324-2017（木家具通用技術條件）——一項涵蓋尺寸、材料、工藝和穩定性的自願性標準。具體強度測試見於QB/T 1952.1-2012（軟體家具——沙發技術要求）和QB/T 2603-2003（家具——強度測試）。這些QB/T標準為工業和信息化部（MIIT）發布的行業標準。出口英國的中國製造商通常持有QB/T檢測報告。但QB/T測試參數、載荷等級和疲勞循環次數與BS EN 12520/12521測試規程不符，英國零售商不接受其作為等效依據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 3324-2017 — General technical requirements for wooden furniture (voluntary, SAC)
QB/T 1952.1-2012 — Upholstered furniture — Technical requirements for sofas (industry standard, MIIT)
QB/T 2603-2003 — Furniture strength tests (industry standard, MIIT)

gap.en: The gap is evidence of safety under UK GPSR, not a mandatory BS EN route. Key gaps: (1) Test reports — Chinese QB/T structural test reports may not satisfy UK buyers or enforcement expectations; BS EN 12520/12521 testing from a UKAS-accredited or ILAC MRA-member lab is a common voluntary evidence route, while equivalent engineering evidence may also support compliance; (2) Load levels — EN 12520 specifies higher load levels and more fatigue cycles than QB/T 1952.1 for seating; redesign may be needed; (3) Children's furniture — bunk beds and children's furniture may have additional legal duties under applicable UK product-safety rules, with BS EN 747 often used as voluntary evidence of safety; (4) No pre-market approval required — compliance is self-declared but the importer bears full liability under GPSR if the product is unsafe.
gap.zh: 差距在于英国GPSR下的安全证明，而不是必须采用BS EN路径。主要差距：（1）检测报告——中国QB/T结构检测报告可能无法满足英国买家或执法预期；由UKAS认可或ILAC MRA成员实验室按BS EN 12520/12521测试是常见的自愿证明路径，也可用等效工程证据支持合规；（2）载荷等级——EN 12520对座椅规定的载荷等级和疲劳循环次数高于QB/T 1952.1；可能需要重新设计；（3）儿童家具——双层床及儿童家具可能须满足适用英国产品安全规则下的额外法律义务，BS EN 747通常用作自愿安全证据；（4）无需上市前审批——合规为自我声明，但若产品不安全，进口商须承担GPSR下的完全责任。
gap.zht: 差距在於英國GPSR下的安全證明，而不是必須採用BS EN路徑。主要差距：（1）檢測報告——中國QB/T結構檢測報告可能無法滿足英國買家或執法預期；由UKAS認可或ILAC MRA成員實驗室按BS EN 12520/12521測試是常見的自願證明路徑，也可用等效工程證據支持合規；（2）載荷等級——EN 12520對座椅規定的載荷等級和疲勞循環次數高於QB/T 1952.1；可能需要重新設計；（3）兒童家具——雙層床及兒童家具可能須滿足適用英國產品安全規則下的額外法律義務，BS EN 747通常用作自願安全證據；（4）無需上市前審批——合規為自我聲明，但若產品不安全，進口商須承擔GPSR下的完全責任。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: UK GPSR requires safe products. BS EN 12520/12521/747 are voluntary evidence routes and retailer procurement benchmarks; alternatives are allowed if they demonstrate equivalent safety. Children's furniture may have additional mandatory duties under applicable UK product-safety legislation.
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary (GB/T 3324, QB/T) for domestic export market; mandatory GB standards apply only to specific product categories

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UK GPSR is the mandatory legal obligation: domestic furniture placed on the GB market must be safe. BS EN 12520:2015 (seating), BS EN 12521:2015 (tables) and BS EN 747 (bunk beds) are voluntary standards commonly used to evidence safety and meet retailer expectations, but equivalent evidence may be used. Chinese QB/T reports may not be accepted by UK buyers unless they demonstrate equivalent safety against UK market expectations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 【仅供参考】英国GPSR是强制性法律义务：投放大不列颠市场的家用家具必须安全。BS EN 12520:2015（座椅）、BS EN 12521:2015（桌子）和BS EN 747（双层床）是通常用于证明安全并满足零售商预期的自愿性标准，但也可使用等效证据。中国QB/T报告如不能证明达到英国市场预期的等效安全水平，可能不被英国买家接受。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 【僅供參考】英國GPSR是強制性法律義務：投放大不列顛市場的家用家具必須安全。BS EN 12520:2015（座椅）、BS EN 12521:2015（桌子）和BS EN 747（雙層床）是通常用於證明安全並滿足零售商預期的自願性標準，但也可使用等效證據。中國QB/T報告如不能證明達到英國市場預期的等效安全水平，可能不被英國買家接受。
